'''âth-v-b-sh''' ('''kathavbeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:technicalize|technicalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-v-b-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:technicalize|technicalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-v-b-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kathavbeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithavbeshoko|thithavbeshoko]] || [[word:jithavbeshoko|jithavbeshoko]] || [[word:shithavbeshoko|shithavbeshoko]] || [[word:kithavbeshoko|kithavbeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthavbeshoko|thuthuthavbeshoko]] || [[word:jujuthavbeshoko|jujuthavbeshoko]] || [[word:shushuthavbeshoko|shushuthavbeshoko]] || [[word:kukuthavbeshoko|kukuthavbeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthavbeshoko|thuthavbeshoko]] || [[word:juthavbeshoko|juthavbeshoko]] || [[word:shuthavbeshoko|shuthavbeshoko]] || [[word:kuthavbeshoko|kuthavbeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthavbeshoko|thuthavbeshoko]] || [[word:juthavbeshoko|juthavbeshoko]] || [[word:shuthavbeshoko|shuthavbeshoko]] || [[word:kuthavbeshoko|kuthavbeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethavbeshoko|thethavbeshoko]] || [[word:jethavbeshoko|jethavbeshoko]] || [[word:shethavbeshoko|shethavbeshoko]] || [[word:kethavbeshoko|kethavbeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothavbeshoko|thothothavbeshoko]] || [[word:jojothavbeshoko|jojothavbeshoko]] || [[word:shoshothavbeshoko|shoshothavbeshoko]] || [[word:kokothavbeshoko|kokothavbeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothavbeshoko|thothavbeshoko]] || [[word:jothavbeshoko|jothavbeshoko]] || [[word:shothavbeshoko|shothavbeshoko]] || [[word:kothavbeshoko|kothavbeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothavbeshoko|thothavbeshoko]] || [[word:jothavbeshoko|jothavbeshoko]] || [[word:shothavbeshoko|shothavbeshoko]] || [[word:kothavbeshoko|kothavbeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthavbeshoko|thĂŠthavbeshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠthavbeshoko|jĂŠthavbeshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠthavbeshoko|shĂŠthavbeshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠthavbeshoko|kĂŠthavbeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathavbeshoko|thathathavbeshoko]] || [[word:jajathavbeshoko|jajathavbeshoko]] || [[word:shashathavbeshoko|shashathavbeshoko]] || [[word:kakathavbeshoko|kakathavbeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathavbeshoko|thathavbeshoko]] || [[word:jathavbeshoko|jathavbeshoko]] || [[word:shathavbeshoko|shathavbeshoko]] || [[word:kathavbeshoko|kathavbeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathavbeshoko|thathavbeshoko]] || [[word:jathavbeshoko|jathavbeshoko]] || [[word:shathavbeshoko|shathavbeshoko]] || [[word:kathavbeshoko|kathavbeshoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shathavbeshithi|shathavbeshithi]] || [[word:shathavbeshiji|shathavbeshiji]] || [[word:shathavbeshishi|shathavbeshishi]] || [[word:shathavbeshiki|shathavbeshiki]]
